message.content:
@startuml
title Secure Map Reduce 2 - Shuffle Service Token Flow

participant "Client\n(c)" as c
participant "Resource\nManager\n(rm)" as rm
participant "Node\nManager\n(nm)" as nm
participant "Shuffle\nHandler\n(ss)" as ss
participant "Application\nMaster\n(am)" as am
participant "Application\nContainer\n(ac)" as ac #red
participant "Task\n(t)" as t #orange
participant "File\nSystem\n(fs)" as fs

== Bootstrap ==

== Job Definition ==

c -> rm : **1** createJob [...] ()\n   : job-id
c -> c : **createShuffleToken**\n**2** ( shfl-tkn-mk )\n   : shfl-tkn
c -> c : **serializeTokens**\n**3** ( shfl-tkn, ... )\n   : c-tokens{shfl-tkn,...}

== Job Submission ==

c -> rm : **submitApplication**\n**4** [...]\n   ( job-id, c-tokens{shfl-tkn}, ... )\n   : app-rpt{clnt-tkn}

== Job Initiation ==

rm -> nm : **startContainer**\n**5** [...]\n   ( c-tokens{shfl-tkn},svc-tokens{shfl-tkn}, ... )
nm -> nm : **6** initApp\n( job-id, shfl-tkn )
nm -> am : **7** exec
am -> nm : **startContainer**\n**8** [...]\n   ( svc-tokens{shfl-tkn}, ... )
nm -> ac : **9** exec
ac -> t : **10** exec

== Map Task Execution ==

t -> fs : **11** writeShuffleData[]():

== Reduce Task Execution ==

ac -> ss : **12** readShuffleData [SDT:shfl-tkn] (...): shfl-data
ss -> fs : **13** readShuffleData
fs --> ss : **14** shfl-data

== Job Completion ==

@enduml
